get.summary: Liveness + DB reachability. Used by Railway health checks.

Hand the SPA a CSRF token (and set its matching cookie). Call right after
login and reuse the token for the session's state-changing requests. Safe
(GET) so it isn't itself CSRF-protected.
Boat switcher — which boats can this account operate.
GET /houseboats — public list of live boats.

post.summary: Take a hold on one cabin. Returns server-authoritative expires_at.
Convert holds → confirmed booking + invoice. Instant confirmation.
Full-boat group buyout: pick a band + headcount, one total, one payer.
Book a spare place on an open-seat cabin (Path §3). Drops the first booker's bill.
Cancel a booking (Path B). Frees cabins, computes policy refund, notifies waitlist.
Reschedule a booking to another departure (owner-side; reprices).

get.summary:
Owner-visible list of their subscription invoices (to see what to pay).
 Accessible even when locked.

post.summary: Start a hosted payment for an invoice. Returns the URL to redirect to.

SSLCommerz IPN (server-to-server). We NEVER trust the posted status — we
re-validate by val_id, then record the payment idempotently.

get.summary:
Browser landing after the hosted page. Purely UX — the IPN is the source of
truth. Bounce the user back to the SPA; it polls the invoice for status.

post.summary:
Replay a batch of offline intents. Returns a per-intent result plus a
human summary ("7 actions synced, 1 needs review").

operatingDates.description: ISO date strings — only these dates generate bookable departures.

dates.description: ISO date strings the profile applies to. Empty for the default profile.

rules.description: Full independent price table for this profile.

childAges.description:
Ages of the children, so each is charged per the boat's child_policy age
bands. If omitted, children are charged full. Length should match children.

openSeat.description:
Opt-in: leave the unfilled places in this cabin as a shared "open seat"
bookable by others. Priced at the full-capacity BUYOUT (plan §3); the
customer pays only the deposit here.

useCredit.description: Apply the customer's open credits toward this invoice.

headcount.description: Headcount the customer types; must fall inside a group band.

amount.description: Optional partial (deposit) amount. Defaults to the full outstanding.

intentId.description: Client-generated id so replays of the same intent are idempotent.

deviceTime.description: Device clock when the action was taken (may be manipulated).
